creator: shell@shellhung.org
text:
Run perl standard test scripts with statistics

You can write test scripts without knowing the exact output this
module expects by using "Test" modules.  However, by using this
module, you can know the specifics, and you can prints some
performance statistics that are computed by the Benchmark module.

Fix: 

Distfile can be obtain from <CPAN>/modules/by-module/Test/Test-Harness-1.23.tar.gz

I did the FreeBSD port for this module, please take a look at : (shar format)
  http://www.shellhung.org/FreeBSD/newports/p5-Test-Harness.shar.txt
